calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion For Set Aside Judgment
Off Calendar Nov-21-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASS0CIATES, LLC's Motion For Set Aside Judgment.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed "application for order to set aside judgment and for dismissal" is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which states the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: S. Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)

Notice Of Motion For Set Aside Judgment
Off Calendar Feb-05-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASS0CIATES, LLC's Notice Of Motion For Set Aside Judgment.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court notes appearances were required. The Court takes the matter off calendar, as the parties failed to appear.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported (302/RBU)
